seoTitle: North Macquarie vs North Narooma — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between North Macquarie and North Narooma. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: North Macquarie vs North Narooma: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in North Macquarie and North Narooma.
heading: North Macquarie vs North Narooma — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Macquarie, New South Wales and North Narooma, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Narooma has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to North Macquarie (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Macquarie or North Narooma safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Macquarie has a flood risk score of 46/100, while North Narooma scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Macquarie scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. North Narooma scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Macquarie or North Narooma?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Narooma has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
